title: humiriastrum procerum
intro: Humiriastrum procerum, also known as the "Humiriastrum tree," is a plant species in the family Clusiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and bark of the Humiriastrum procerum are rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which provide various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Humiriastrum procerum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
